Orlanta BioMaterials SE — Internal Compliance Note on GDPR/MAR Workflows (EU)
Issuer context: Orlanta BioMaterials SE (LEI 000000ORLANTASE01, ISIN ZX0000000001), admitted to trading on Euronext Growth Paris; investor presentation and product roadmap were filed in the ESMA OAM on 15 May 2026; no unannounced transactions are pending.
MAR status: insider list maintained using ESMA template; prior grant award and pilot program were publicly disclosed; no MNPI remains, and the trading window is open per the Issuer Dealing Code.
GDPR Art 9: special category indicators used solely for occupational health; explicit consent records retained; DPA Schedule 2 (processing limits and safeguards) in force; minimisation embedded in onboarding form VOF-17 (no national identifier field collected).
Cross-border transfer: completed migration of pseudonymised analytics logs to processor NordRiver Compute S.A.R.L. (Lumeria, non-EEA) under 2021 SCCs; Transfer Impact Assessment TIA-12 approved by the Data Export Approval Committee (DEA-2026-19).
Retention markers: RS-05 schedule auto-purges device telemetry after 90 days; HR medical attestations retained 6 years under applicable Member State law; 21 May 2026 audit of retention timers found no overruns.
DSAR status: seven requests closed in April; one erasure request (Ticket DSAR-ER-0441) is at day 34 with no Article 12(3) extension on file—remediation owner assigned and notification to the data subject to be issued today.
Erasure handling: all other erasure requests processed with irreversible deletion receipts and suppression list entries; backup rotation policy excludes targeted restores for erased records.
Consent withdrawal: latest marketing consent withdrawal (Ref CW-2026-018) reflected in CRM suppression within 24 hours; no re-mailing or profiling occurred following withdrawal.
Data minimisation: collection forms disable free-text fields by default; optional demographic fields remain unselected unless explicit purpose exists; PIAs confirm analytics datasets exclude special category data.
Data export approvals: no new third-country transfers are planned this quarter; prior approvals archived under DEA-2025-07 and DEA-2026-19 with review dates calendared.
DPA schedules and onboarding: Schedule 3 (subprocessors) reviewed—no additional third-country subprocessors added; vendor onboarding for CloudLedger Pay s.r.o. deferred pending adequacy and SCC mapping.
CSRD/SFDR linkage: CSRD Annex and SFDR PAI statement rely on aggregated workforce and supply-chain metrics; no individual-level PII is exported; sustainability KPIs are public and filed via the home NCA portal.
Adverse event check: there has been no data breach, no insider leak, and no investor complaint regarding MAR controls; the public helpline listed on our website logged zero cases in Q2.
Actions: close DSAR-ER-0441 with Article 12 notification, file delay rationale if extension needed, and document remediation in the DSAR register.
Contacts: dpo@orlantabiomaterials.eu and marketcompliance@orlantabiomaterials.eu for follow-up.
